solutions.solution:
(d) Total time from 3 O' clock Sunday afternoon to 10 O' clock Tuesday morning = 43 h
Total increased time = 12/5 × 43 = 172 s = 2 min 52s
∴ Time at 10 O' clock Tuesday morning = 2 min 52 s past 10

(d) Total time from 12 O' clock afternoon to 4 O' clock morning = 12 O' clock after noon to 12 O' clock night + 12 O' clock night to 4 O' clock morning = 12 + 4 = 16 h
Since in 24 h (1 day), the clock becomes 15 min fast.
∴ In 16 h clock will be 15 × 16/24 = 10 min fast
∴ Required time = 4 : 00 + 0 : 10 = 4 : 10

(b) Time from 5 am of a particular day to 10 pm on the 3rd day is 89 h. Now, the clock loses 16 min in 24 h or in other words, we can say that 23 h 44 min of this clock is equal to 24 h of the correct clock.
(23 + 44/60) h of this clock = 24h of the correct clock
356/15 h of this clock = 24h of the correct clock
∴ 89 h of this clock = (24 × 15/356 × 89) h the correct clock = 90 h of the correct clock
or 89 h of this clock = 90 h of the correct clock. Therefore, it is clear that in 90 h this clock loses 1 h and hence, the correct time is 11 pm when this clock shows 10 pm.

(b) Time from Monday noon (12 pm) to 2 pm the following Monday = 7 days 2 h = 170 h
Now, the watch gains (2 + 4/5) min from Monday (12 pm) to 2 pm, the following Monday.
In other words, the watch gains 34/5 min in 170 h.
Therefore, it will gain 2 min in (170 × 5/34 × 2) = 50 h = 2 days 2 h
Therefore, the watch is correct after 2 days 2 h from Monday noon or at 2 pm Wednesday

(b) According to the question,
Total time from 9 am on 3rd of the December to 3 pm on 6th of the December = 3 days 6 h = 78 h
Also, the clock loses in 78 h = (15 + 25) = 40 min
So, the clock loses 15 min in = 15/40 × 78 = 29 h 15 min
Therefore, the clock is correct after 29 h 15 min from 9 am on 3rd December i.e., at 2:15 pm on 4th December.

(d) According to the question,
One clock loses = 3 min/h
Other clock gains = 2 min/h
So, the difference in min between these two clocks in one hour = 2 − (−3) = (2 + 3) min = 5 min
(Loss in minutes = Negative sign)
Total time from 10 am to 4 pm on Sunday = 6h
Therefore, the difference in minutes between these two clocks from 10 am to 4 pm on Sunday = (5 × 6) = 30 min

(c) Required result = (720/11 − x)(60 × 24/x) min
Here, x = 65
∴ Required result = (720/11 − 65)(60 × 24/65) min
= 5/11 × 288/13 min
= 10 10/143 min gain
(gain as sign is positive)

(b) Required result = (720/11 − x)(60 × 24/x) min
Here, x = 58
∴ Required result = (720/11 − 58)(60 × 24/58) min
= 82/11 × 720/29 min = 185 25/319 min gain
(gain as sign is positive)

(d) Required result = (720/11 − x)(60 × 24/x) min
Here, x = 62
∴ Required result = (720/11 − 62)(60 × 24/62) min
= 38/11 × 720/31 min = 80 80/341 min gain
(gain as sign is positive)

(c) ∴ Required result = (720/11 − x)(60 × 24/x) min
Here, x = 76
∴ Required result = (720/11 − 76)(60 × 24/76) min
= −116/11 × 360/19 min = −199 169/209 min
(loss as sign is negative)
